iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_low_descriptor_cc_library(
  NAME
    descriptors
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::spirv_low_descriptor_shard
  ARGS
    "--descriptor-set=spirv_logical_core"
  DEPS
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    isa
  HDRS
    "isa.h"
  DEPS

  PUBLIC
)

loom_generated_textual_header(
  NAME
    features_header_gen
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::spirv_features
  ARGS
    "--isa-header=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/isa.h"
  OUTPUT
    "features.h"
  OUTPUT_FLAG
    "--header"
  COMMENT
    "Generating SPIR-V feature header"
)

loom_generated_textual_header(
  NAME
    features_tables_gen
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::spirv_features
  ARGS
    "--isa-header=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/isa.h"
  OUTPUT
    "features_tables.inl"
  OUTPUT_FLAG
    "--tables"
  COMMENT
    "Generating SPIR-V feature tables"
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    features
  HDRS
    "features.h"
  TEXTUAL_HDRS
    "features_tables.inl"
  SRCS
    "features.c"
  DEPS
    ::isa
    iree::base
  PUBLIC
)

iree_package_name(_PACKAGE_NAME)
add_dependencies(
  "${_PACKAGE_NAME}_features.objects"
  "${_PACKAGE_NAME}_features_header_gen"
  "${_PACKAGE_NAME}_features_tables_gen"
)
